title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-3B Shared-Router Integration Preflight

changes.content:
# Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-3B

Mission: `ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592`

This is a static, bounded shared-router integration preflight.

The plan adds only the preflight runner and this README inside:

`Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT`

The runner reads a fixed list of Technical Core, Desktop, WebUI, and authorization
source files. It does not walk or search the filesystem. It generates seven
deterministic preflight outputs in the same mission directory.

It performs no live-state measurement, process/service/listener/port inspection,
memory/storage/startup/registry inspection, network access, model call, GUI launch,
installation, diagnosis, repair, optimization, recommendation about system
performance, or K: access.

It does not modify the shared adapter, Desktop, WebUI, helpers, V1B-3A broker,
V1B-2 provider, or historical evidence route.

validations.name: Verify exact V1B-3B preflight payloads and authoritative reference hashes
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
expected={
 r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT/v1b3b_shared_router_integration_preflight.py":(34283,"8e9f197a7abc56d21721299a74e6feb925ecae4a1fa1886f4b4ea3a8ff681251"),
 r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT/README_V1B3B.md":(936,"7858ca3ebdc830c37b67ad5a756ccf6b2e2ac0a96a731589431b0cf0a0055a67"),
}
for rel,(size,digest) in expected.items():
 p=root/Path(rel)
 data=p.read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==size,(rel,len(data),size)
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,rel
compile((root/Path(r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT/v1b3b_shared_router_integration_preflight.py")).read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b3b-preflight>","exec")
manifest=root/Path(r"System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/Reference/TECHNICAL_CORE_REFERENCE_MANIFEST.json")
guide=root/Path(r"System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/Reference/TECHNICAL_CORE_REFERENCE_GUIDE.md")
assert hashlib.sha256(manifest.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="459b1d16af76af323fdd5037af7f044c7accf19db7e40652c3c7a6bb0d883737"
assert hashlib.sha256(guide.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="d194b5c649e29a06b1b5d2b8438185b35674318d5c5410f1583df59b3782d570"
print("V1B3B_EXACT_PAYLOADS_AND_AUTHORITATIVE_REFERENCE_OK")

validations.name: Run deterministic bounded shared-router integration preflight
Verify exact seven preflight outputs and zero-live-execution safety receipt
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/Path(r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT")
names={
 "V1B3B_PRIMARY_INPUT_INVENTORY.json",
 "V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_FINDINGS.json",
 "V1B3B_AUTHORIZATION_FINDINGS.json",
 "V1B3B_PASS_THROUGH_MATRIX.json",
 "V1B3B_MINIMAL_INTEGRATION_RECOMMENDATION.json",
 "V1B3B_PREFLIGHT_REPORT.md",
 "V1B3B_PREFLIGHT_RECEIPT.json",
}
assert all((out/name).is_file() for name in names)
receipt=json.loads((out/"V1B3B_PREFLIGHT_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592"
assert receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"]==7
assert receipt["authoritative_reference_verified"] is True
assert receipt["required_inputs_missing"]==[]
assert receipt["existing_live_source_files_modified"]==0
assert receipt["live_state_providers_invoked"]==0
assert receipt["live_scans"]==0
assert receipt["process_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["service_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["listener_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["port_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["memory_measurement"] is False
assert receipt["storage_measurement"] is False
assert receipt["startup_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["registry_inspection"] is False
assert receipt["network_used"] is False
assert receipt["model_calls"]==0
assert receipt["guis_launched"]==0
assert receipt["packages_installed"] is False
assert receipt["k_access"] is False
assert receipt["filesystem_search_performed"] is False
assert receipt["fixed_file_list_only"] is True
assert receipt["historical_evidence_used_as_current"] is False
for row in receipt["outputs_excluding_receipt"]:
 data=(out/row["name"]).read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"],row["name"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"],row["name"]
recommendation=json.loads((out/"V1B3B_MINIMAL_INTEGRATION_RECOMMENDATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert recommendation["integration_scope"]["modify_only_shared_adapter"] is True
assert recommendation["integration_scope"]["desktop_source_change_required"] is False
assert recommendation["integration_scope"]["webui_source_change_required"] is False
assert recommendation["classification_only_behavior"]["can_execute_live_provider"] is False
print("V1B3B_EXACT_OUTPUTS_AND_SAFETY_RECEIPT_OK")

validations.name: Verify every bounded primary input remains byte-for-byte unchanged
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/Path(r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT")
inventory=json.loads((out/"V1B3B_PRIMARY_INPUT_INVENTORY.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert inventory["filesystem_search_performed"] is False
assert inventory["fixed_file_list_only"] is True
assert inventory["missing_required_inputs"]==[]
for row in inventory["inputs"]:
 if not row["exists"]:
  continue
 p=Path(row["path"])
 data=p.read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"],row["logical_name"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"],row["logical_name"]
routing=json.loads((out/"V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_FINDINGS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert routing["route_message_found"] is True
assert routing["slash_command_lines"]
assert routing["proposed_integration_anchor"]["after_line"] < routing["proposed_integration_anchor"]["before_line"]
print("V1B3B_BOUNDED_PRIMARY_INPUTS_REMAIN_UNCHANGED")

validations.name: Verify exact two-file add-only Workshop snapshot
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
snap=root/Path(r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/snapshots/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json"))
assert manifests,str(snap)
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=sorted([
 r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT/v1b3b_shared_router_integration_preflight.py".replace("/","\\"),
 r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260723-025402-DF9592_V1B3B_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT/README_V1B3B.md".replace("/","\\"),
])
normalized=sorted(str(row["relative_path"]).replace("/","\\") for row in entries)
assert normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("V1B3B_EXACT_TWO_FILE_ADD_ONLY_SNAPSHOT_OK")
